I have hands but cannot clap. What am I?

What can run but never walk?
I am always in front of you but cannot be seen. What am I?
What has keys but no locks, space but no room?
I have an eye but cannot see. What am I?

I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body but come alive with wind. What am I?
What has cities but no houses, forests but no trees, and rivers but no water?
The more you remove from me, the bigger I become. What am I?
What can fill a room but takes up no space?
I have branches but no fruit, no trunk and no leaves. What am I?
I am not alive but I can grow. I have no lungs but I need air. What am I?

What is always coming but never arrives?
I can be cracked, made, told and played. What am I?

He remembered his wife died on a ship
questions.answer: He remembered his wife died on a ship
